examples: These discrepancies influence what is likely to ail you.
The wounds of earth may even be associated with regions that ail you in the physical.
Is at least as familiar to me, as a Romanticist, as "What can ail thee, knight at arms?"
Yn ystod ail hanner y sesiwn, trodd ACau eu sylw at graffu ar y Mesur Hylendid Bwyd (Cymru).
Bu Ms Randerson hefyd yn ail-ddatgan ei hawydd tymor-hir i weld cyfnewidfa stoc Gymreig yn cael ei sefydlu.
